content.en:
Seven thousand three hundred and sixty-two territories.

Ye Tian began to practice in retreat.

He first took out the smallest fragment of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone, and then swallowed it, using the extradimensional power to absorb the energy contained in it.

I have to say that the energy contained in the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone is too majestic.

Ye Tian was fortunate to have refined the power of the super-dimensional to the realm of perfection, and he also had some understanding of the super-dimensional rules, otherwise he would really not be able to absorb a trace of energy inside.

Rumble!!!!!

A trace of energy from the fragment of the Extradimensional Domain Boundary Stone was absorbed by Ye Tian, integrated into the Extradimensional Body, and began to quickly refine the Extradimensional Body.

"It's so good!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Although this trace of energy is small, the quality is too high, and it is even more powerful than the refining effect of the superdimensional origin bead.

But if you think about it carefully, it's normal, this thing is for the powerhouses of the third realm transcendent realm, even if it's an insignificant small fragment, it contains unimaginable energy.

After a long time, this trace of energy was depleted, and he continued to absorb the energy from the fragments.

In this way, with the help of this fragment of the Transcendental Domain Boundary Stone, Ye Tian continued to refine the Transcendental Body, so that the refining progress of the Transcendental Body could be rapidly improved.

Originally, his Extradimensional Body 20 refining level was only six percent and less than seven percent, but now it has quickly increased to seven percent refining level.

The years passed.

Ye Tian's extradimensional body became stronger and stronger.

Eight percent!

Nine percent!

Ten percent!

One extradimensional epoch after another has passed.

After five extradimensional epochs had passed, he had already refined this fragment of the extradimensional realm boundary stone.

And the tempering level of his extradimensional body has reached fifty-six percent, and this kind of ascension speed is simply terrifying.

"The extradimensional body has been tempered to fifty-six percent, and my physical body is at least five times stronger!!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he took out a larger fragment of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone.

This is his last extradimensional realm boundary stone fragment, and if he uses it, the level will be gone.

But he didn't care and swallowed it in one gulp.

"I hope that with the help of this fragment of the Transcendental Realm Boundary Stone, the Transcendental Body can be refined to the Perfection Realm, so as to advance to the Transcendental Realm Cultivation!"

That's what he wants, but it's not necessarily going to happen.

Even though this fragment of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone is larger, it is becoming more and more difficult for the extradimensional body to be tempered to the later stage, and the energy consumed will naturally increase.

Really.

As time passed, the refinement of the extradimensional body became more and more difficult, and the energy that needed to be consumed became more and more.

Using the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone to temper the Extradimensional Body is in itself a waste.

It's like writing a thousand-year-old painting as an ordinary piece of paper, which is really wasteful.

But for Ye Tian, it is especially important to be able to improve his strength faster, and when he reaches the third realm in the future, he will definitely be able to find more extradimensional boundary stones, so there is no need to save them.

Moreover, his cultivation was too low, and if he dared to trade the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone, he would definitely die.

So, that's the best option right now.

As the Extradimensional Boundary Stone Fragments were consumed, the progress of his Extradimensional Body skyrocketed.

Sixty percent!

Seventy percent!

Eighty percent!

When Ye Tian's superdimensional body refining level reached ninety-one percent, this fragment of the superdimensional realm boundary stone was completely exhausted.

"It's a pity that I didn't refine the extradimensional body to the consummation realm!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

But his strength is much stronger than in the past, and he is also very satisfied with such an improvement.

Ye Tian soon came to the Ice Ghost Organization Branch, and then entered this extradimensional realm ruin.

Interior of the ruins.

Ye Tian still copied multiple duplicate bodies, and then broke into the core area.

As they approached the palace, the golems fused again and became one gigantic spirit golem.

In the past, this spirit puppet was enough to kill Ye Tian in an instant. []

But now, he will definitely not be killed by this spirit golem.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian made a brazen attack and collided head-on with this spirit puppet.

In an instant, the two sides collided together.

With Ye Tian's half-step invincible strength in the transcendent realm, he was still killed by this spirit puppet with one blow, and his whole body was cracked, but at least he blocked it.

"This spirit puppet is too terrifying, with my current cultivation, I can't stop it, even if I temper the superdimensional body to the level of ninety-nine percent, it is definitely not its opponent, unless I can comprehend the superdimensional rules in the half-step superdimensional realm, I can easily suppress it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, his goal was not to defeat the spirit puppet head-on, he only needed to stop the other party and let one of his replica bodies break into the palace.

Whoa!!

A replica body of Ye Tian descended and besieged this spirit puppet.

Suddenly, the spirit puppet was involved.

Immediately afterwards, one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies took the opportunity to break into the palace, making this spirit puppet angry and roaring wildly, but it couldn't stop Ye Tian.

......

Interior of the mysterious palace.

Ye Tian came in.

The interior of this palace was filled with terrifying extradimensional rule power, which made Ye Tian's body withstand unimaginable pressure.

"At the very least, this is the remnant of the second extradimensional realm!"

Ye Tian secretly said 823.

Because only the extradimensional realm of the second realm can master such powerful extradimensional rules.

Ye Tian advanced step by step, and soon walked to the depths of the palace.

Here, he saw a corpse, only half of it, but it exuded an aura of terror.

At this moment, a projection appeared on the corpse, which was a projection from a past time and space.

"Latecomer, I am the third realm of the transcendent realm - the master of the Kuntong realm, I have fallen, Your Excellency can enter here, either the superdimensional realm at the peak of the third realm, or the half-step transcendent realm that has comprehended the rules of the transcendent dimension, no matter what the case is, there is hope to avenge me. If Your Excellency is willing for me to kill the Holy Sea Realm Lord at the peak of the Third Realm, I am willing to hand over my last three treasures to Your Excellency. As long as you make a vow, three treasures can be delivered. Otherwise everything here will be annihilated and nothing will be left. "

After the Kuntong Realm Lord's words were finished, Ye Tian's face changed slightly.

He was not afraid of the means left by the Kuntong Realm Lord, it was a big deal that this replica body was killed.

However, the treasures left behind in the third transcendent realm must be extremely precious, and it would be a pity to lose them.

"Okay, I'm willing to make a vow!"

Ye Tian immediately began to take the oath.

And just after he finished taking the oath, three rays of light appeared, and they were the three treasures left by the master of the Kuntong Realm.
